items.promptRaw: アイスバーン上や雪路で運転する場合、何に注意すべきか。
optionsRaw: A 制動距離が長くなる
C 路面付着力が増す

D. Braking performance does not change

items.promptRaw: 山道での走行時、カーブへ入る前に対向車が来ていない場合どうすべきか。
optionsRaw: A 減速してクラクションを鳴らし右側寄りを走行する
B カーブの外側寄りを走行する

D 加速しカーブの最短ルートを通過する

items.translatedPrompt: When driving on a mountain road, what should you do before entering a curve if no oncoming vehicles are present?
optionsTranslated: A. Slow down, sound the horn, and drive close to the right side
B. Drive close to the outside of the curve
C. Temporarily occupy the oncoming lane
D. Accelerate and take the shortest route through the curve
translatedOptions: A. Slow down, sound the horn, and drive close to the right side
B. Drive close to the outside of the curve
C. Temporarily occupy the oncoming lane
D. Accelerate and take the shortest route through the curve

items.promptRaw: 対向車とすれ違うであろう位置が思わしくなかった場合どうすべきか。
optionsRaw: A 加速して良い位置を選ぶ
B 減速して対向車とすれ違う、または停止して道をゆずる
C 左車道を占用し、対向車を減速させ道をゆずらせる
D ヘッドランプを切り対向車に停止するよう合図をする
items.promptTranslated: What should you do if you are not comfortable with the position where you will pass an oncoming vehicle?
items.translatedPrompt: What should you do if you are not comfortable with the position where you will pass an oncoming vehicle?
optionsTranslated: A: Accelerate and choose a good position
B: Slow down and pass the oncoming vehicle, or stop and yield the road
C: Occupy the left lane and make the oncoming vehicle slow down and yield
D: Turn off your headlights to signal the oncoming vehicle to stop
translatedOptions: A: Accelerate and choose a good position
B: Slow down and pass the oncoming vehicle, or stop and yield the road
C: Occupy the left lane and make the oncoming vehicle slow down and yield
D: Turn off your headlights to signal the oncoming vehicle to stop
